title: Convoluted Hud
description: A modpack that tries to fill as much of the screen with information as possible.
body: Convoluted ui is a joke modpack which ensures you will see as much information about your game as possible, and as little of your actual game as possible. it uses a variety of hud mods which all show unique information ensuring no repeated statistics. if you like to read more than play, this modpack is for you.
